description_long: This stuffed toy is a bear with a striking two-tone design, split vertically down the middle. The left side is a soft white, featuring a friendly round eye and a simple black nose and mouth, while the right side is a dark gray or black with a red, jagged eye and a sinister grin, giving it a mischievous or villainous appearance. The bear has rounded ears, a plump belly with a circular patch, and outstretched arms, suggesting a welcoming or playful gesture. Its legs are short and stubby, matching the overall chubby and cuddly form. The surface appears to be made of a matte, plush fabric, typical of stuffed toys, with visible seams and soft contours. The toy's design is reminiscent of the character Monokuma from the Danganronpa series, known for its distinctive half-and-half color scheme and expressive face.
description: A plush bear toy with a split black-and-white design, featuring a friendly face on one side and a sinister, red-eyed grin on the other. The toy is chubby, soft, and has outstretched arms, with a matte, plush surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's split face, with one side white and friendly, the other black with a red, jagged eye and a toothy grin.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dark half of the bear, with the red eye and ear visible, and the arm and leg extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical color split down the back, with both arms and legs visible and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the white half of the bear, with a round ear, simple eye, and the arm and leg extending outward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is split: the left side is neutral and friendly with a simple smile, while the right side is menacing with a jagged red eye and a wide, toothy grin.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched horizontally and legs slightly apart.
